creator: Mikitayo

precrop_op.type: 1:1 square crop (no scaling, no colour edit)

rationale: Center-cover would land the headline partly on the bright metal sweep; this crop (shifted right+down into the dark glass band) drops central-band luminance 110->95 for clean white-headline contrast while keeping the diagonal architecture as top/bottom framing. Text-safe (no signage/text/people); on brief (neutral civic, no gov/NDIS-identifying markers).
